nodes.label: Market Regime Detection =======================  Implements two-layer market reg
Compute slow regime component signals          Args:         spx_prices: SPX wee
Map risk score to regime state and constraints          Args:         risk_score
Check if regime has persisted for required weeks          Args:         current_
Detect slow regime state          Args:         spx_prices: SPX weekly close pri
Detect price shock (3-day return <= -3%)          Args:         prices: Daily cl
Detect volatility shock (VIX_Z >= 3.0 AND ΔVIX_Z >= 3.5)          Args:
Check if fast risk-off should be triggered          Args:         spx_daily: SPX
Check if fast risk-off should exit          Exit conditions:     1. Duration ela
Update fast risk-off overlay state          Args:         spx_daily: SPX daily p
Detect complete market regime (slow + fast overlay)          Args:         spx_w
